name: myx_common_help
description: Discover myx.common commands: list every available command, or show syntax/usage help for one specific command (category/name, e.g. lib/remoteContext or os/getCpuCount). Call with no arguments first to see what exists.

command.description: Command to show help for, e.g. os/getCpuCount or git/clonePull. Omit to list all available commands.

uname.description: Show commands/help as they exist on a different OS than this host is running. Omit to use this host's own OS.

name: myx_common_run
description: Execute a myx.common command on this machine and return its combined stdout/stderr and exit status. Use myx_common_help first to discover available commands and their syntax. Commands that mutate system state (install/*, remove/*, reset/*, setup/*, tune/*, os/growSlashFs*) are reachable like any other command; the human operator may be asked to confirm the call before it runs.

command.description: Command name, e.g. os/getCpuCount or git/clonePull.

args.description: Positional arguments/flags to pass to the command, in order.

stdin.description: Text to feed to the command standard input, for commands that read stdin (e.g. lib/iterate, lib/parallel).
